current_logic: Equal 25% weights: Crashes/km2, Crashes/10km BP, Crashes/10M Trips, Severity %
yearly_correlation_evidence: Crashes/km2 and Crashes/10km BP are strongly correlated in every year; mean rho = 0.847.
optimized_logic: Do not treat Crashes/10km BP as an independent 25% component. Use one crash-density burden component plus a smaller infrastructure-gap component.

yearly_correlation_evidence: Crashes/10M Trips is distinct from crash density; mean rho = -0.307.
optimized_logic: Keep as an independent component with high weight because it identifies high per-trip risk rather than high activity.

yearly_correlation_evidence: Severity is unstable and nearly independent of volume/density; mean rho with ES crashes = 0.036 and with crash density = 0.008.
optimized_logic: Keep severity, but slightly reduce weight and preserve low-n suppression because it is informative but noisy.

current_logic: Excluded because Crashes/10km BP is treated as the infrastructure component.
yearly_correlation_evidence: BP Share % is consistently negatively associated with crash density; mean rho = -0.824.
optimized_logic: Use inverse BP Share as a small infrastructure-gap component or display/control variable; do not combine it at full weight with crash density.

current_logic: Excluded except indirectly through density/BP rate.
yearly_correlation_evidence: ES crashes and crash density are nearly redundant; mean rho = 0.912.
optimized_logic: Use crash count as a reliability/action-scale gate rather than a full independent risk component.
